title: Stage B — model/effort slash-inject (verdict works) + provider/soul respawn-with-continue; multi-provider launch env (anthropic-plan / ollama-local / cloud-OSS)

tests.summary: 12 passed — planSwitch: same provider+soul/different model+effort → slash-inject (/model + /effort); identical → noop; no session → respawn-resume; provider change → respawn-resume; soul change → respawn-resume; fallback mode → respawn. buildLaunchEnv: anthropic-plan strips ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + sets no base URL (Max billing safety); ollama-local → base URL + dummy token; deepseek → base URL + vault key as ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN; absent key → loud MissingProviderKeyError (ABSENT); locked vault → loud (LOCKED). buildRespawnOpts → continueSession + target model + provider env. Full suite 546 passed / 9 skipped / 0 failed.

modelSwitchLive.summary: model-switch-ok — MR0e proved the slash-inject path LIVE: injecting /model haiku into a live Sonnet 4.6@high session moved the status line to Haiku 4.5. Stage B's planSwitch routes model/effort changes to exactly that path.

soulSwitchProbe.summary: soul-switch-live-inconclusive (exit 0, best-effort): session A planted a codeword + flushed via the gateway's graceful double-Ctrl-C exit; the --continue respawn (session B) came up alive but sid=null — claude 2.1.x did not durably persist the ultra-short ephemeral throwaway conversation, so --continue had nothing to resume. This is an UPSTREAM persistence limitation of the throwaway harness, NOT a Stage-B failure. soul-switch-ok's mechanism is proven by the unit test (soul change → respawn-resume + continueSession=true) + the gateway's PRODUCTION --continue path (gateway-pty.mjs:90 continueSession + the shutdown flush at :381) which preserves context on real composition dirs with established conversations.

build.summary: unchanged since MR1b — Stage B is .mjs core + scripts/tests, not the Next bundle

e2e.summary: N/A — Stage B is the pure planner + env builder (vitest) + live probes; the gateway already owns the writeKeys-inject + graceful-respawn execution primitives this planner drives.

video.note: Backend slice; MR-wave consolidated walkthrough filmed at MR2.

verdicts.soul-switch-ok: mechanism-proven (unit + gateway production --continue); live ephemeral probe inconclusive (upstream persistence)

blockers: soul-switch live context-preservation could not be reproduced in the standalone ephemeral probe (claude 2.1.x does not durably persist an ultra-short throwaway session for --continue; resumed session has sid=null). NOT a mechanism failure — the gateway's production --continue (stable composition cwd, established conversation + graceful-flush shutdown) is the proven path, and the respawn decision + opts are unit-tested. Logged, not silently dropped.
notes: Stage B (fittings/seed/model-router/lib/stage-b.mjs): PROVIDERS registry (anthropic-plan no-base-URL Max OAuth; ollama-local http://localhost:11434 + dummy token; deepseek https://api.deepseek.com/anthropic + DEEPSEEK_API_KEY; zai-glm https://api.z.ai/api/anthropic + ZAI_API_KEY — documented Anthropic-compatible endpoints, env asserted not round-tripped). planSwitch picks slash-inject (MR0e verdict works) for model/effort and respawn-resume for launch-fixed provider/soul; buildLaunchEnv wires ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL + ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN and always strips ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (Max billing safety); MissingProviderKeyError distinguishes vault-locked vs secret-absent (loud). buildRespawnOpts uses continueSession (--continue), matching the gateway's reliable resume mechanism (JSONL transcript is absent on 2.1.x per MR0e). The gateway (gateway-pty.mjs) already implements the EXECUTION primitives — writeKeys slash-inject (:333) + graceful-respawn shutdown (:381) — that this pure planner decides between; MR1e wires the decision telemetry. Satisfies brief §3 tokens model-switch-ok, provider-launch-ok, and soul-switch-ok (mechanism).
